min_entry_age.source_quote: Adults between 18 years and 65 years · Dependent children: 91 days to 25 years(who are economically dependent on their parents).

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adults between 18 years and 65 years · Dependent children: 91 days to 25 years(who are economically dependent on their parents).

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Basic Plan Enhanced Plan ... 30 days/ 60 days / 90 days / 30 days waiting period 30 days waiting period 90 days / 120 days / 180 days ... (Not applicable for accidents)
initial_waiting_period_days._note: Initial/illness waiting period is 30 days for both the Basic Plan and Enhanced Plan (not applicable for accidents); source text is interleaved with the cancellation-refund table in the brochure OCR but the 30-day figure is verbatim-recoverable

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 05 Child Birth Hospital Cash Not Available Available. Note: This beneﬁt is subject to a waiting period of 2 years from the ﬁrst commencement of this Star Hospital Cash Insurance Policy. Only female insured persons are eligible for this beneﬁt

ayush_coverage.source_quote: no AYUSH coverage clause stated; this fixed-benefit daily Hospital Cash plan pays a flat daily cash amount on hospitalization and does not separately indemnify AYUSH treatment, so AYUSH coverage is not defined in any indexed chunk (checked all indexed brochure chunks)

copayment_pct.source_quote: no co-payment clause stated; this is a fixed-benefit daily Hospital Cash plan that pays a flat daily amount (not a percentage of hospitalization expenses), so a co-payment percentage is not defined anywhere in the indexed chunks (checked all indexed brochure chunks)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: no No-Claim-Bonus / Cumulative-Bonus percentage stated; this fixed-benefit daily Hospital Cash plan defines no NCB benefit in any indexed chunk (checked all indexed brochure chunks)

room_rent_capping.source_quote: no room-rent cap or room-category clause stated; this fixed-benefit daily Hospital Cash plan pays a flat daily cash amount and does not reimburse room rent, so room-rent capping is not defined anywhere in the indexed chunks (checked all indexed brochure chunks)

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: no indemnity Sum Insured options list stated; this is a fixed-benefit daily Hospital Cash plan whose cover is a chosen 'Hospital Cash Amount (Per Day)' (the brochure references 'Hospital Cash Amount(Per Day) Options' but the option amounts are not enumerated in any indexed chunk; only the illustration value 'Chosen hospital cash amount of Rs.3000/-' appears) (checked all indexed brochure chunks)

policy_type.source_quote: STAR HOSPITAL CASH INSURANCE POLICY Star Hospital Cash Insurance Policy provides additional protection & takes care of your incidental expenses
